message:
feat(frankenterm-core): implement DECOM in scroll_region_fixtures CoreHarness

Add origin mode (DEC private mode 6) handling to the CoreHarness test
engine so it matches the VirtualTerminal reference model. CursorPosition,
CursorRow, and SetScrollRegion now offset/clamp relative to the scroll
region when DECOM is active. Remove cup_decom_clamp_beyond_region from
KNOWN_FAILURES — the fixture now passes in both engines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
